home2.title: LET ME <1>INTRODUCE</1> MYSELF
home2.body1: I'm a passionate <1>Web and Mobile Developer</1> with over 3 years of experience creating and optimizing high-performance digital products.
home2.body2: I specialize in frameworks like <1>Angular, React Native, and NestJS,</1> focusing on building scalable and maintainable applications with great user experiences.
home2.body3: I’ve worked on corporate systems at <1>Servieduca</1> and developed multiple <1>freelance projects</1> with real-world impact.
home2.body4: I enjoy turning ideas into efficient, elegant solutions using modern tools such as <1>TypeScript, Node.js,</1> and frameworks like <1>React.js</1> and <1>Next.js.</1>

projects.heading: My Recent <1>Works</1>
projects.description: A selection of projects I have contributed to, both professionally and personally.
projects.urbeDesc: Official university portal. Worked on front-end components, service integration, and content management for seamless user experience.
projects.campusDesc: News portal for the university community. Contributed to integration of news services, performance optimization, and responsive layouts.
projects.sustentableDesc: Program focused on sustainability initiatives. Developed interactive sections and enhanced engagement for environmental awareness campaigns.
projects.chatbetDesc: AI-powered betting assistant transforming messaging apps (WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord) into seamless revenue channels. Implemented chat flows and backend integration.
projects.chatlayerDesc: Enterprise-grade conversational AI platform. Worked on integration of messaging solutions for WhatsApp and Telegram, ensuring secure and scalable communication.
projects.bisciDesc: Implemented multilingual translation system for the entire website, improving accessibility and user experience across languages.
projects.tshopDesc: Developed e-commerce platform with secure checkout, product catalog, and responsive design. Contributed to front-end features and performance optimization.
projects.caloDesc: Sports app developed in React Native. Features include tracking exercises, workout plans, and performance analytics. Fully functional, available on GitHub.
projects.igoDesc: Delivery app developed in React Native. Currently in progress, implementing order management, product catalog, and real-time updates.
projects.conectandoDesc: News page developed as part of a thesis project. Focused on content management and responsive layout. Minor project.
projects.bingoDesc: Online bingo card generator using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Minor personal project for learning purposes.

about.profession: I’m a <1>Web and Mobile Developer</1> with over 3 years of experience creating and optimizing scalable applications.
about.job: Currently, I work as a developer at <1>Servieduca</1>, focusing on improving system performance and user experience.
about.hobbiesIntro: When I’m not coding, I enjoy spending time doing other things I’m passionate about:
about.hobby3: Playing video games and listening to music
about.quote: "Keep building, keep learning — every line of code matters."
about.name: Oscar Bueno
about.title: Know Who <1>I'M</1>
